name: LG_UPDATE_CASHTRANS_223_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDATE_CASHTRANS_223_01
       @COEF      SMALLINT,
       @TRCODE    SMALLINT,
       @TRDATE    DATETIME,
       @TRSIGN    SMALLINT,
       @CASHREF   INT,
       @AMOUNT    FLOAT,
       @REPORTNET FLOAT,
       @TRNET FLOAT,
       @TRCURR SMALLINT,
       @CANCELLED SMALLINT,
       @STATUS    SMALLINT AS
DECLARE @NOFDAYS   SMALLINT
DECLARE @EPSILON   FLOAT
DECLARE @DTERROR   SMALLINT
DECLARE @YEARBEG   DATETIME
DECLARE @ACTIVE    SMALLINT
DECLARE @LOCALTYPE SMALLINT
DECLARE @CURRTYPE  SMALLINT
DECLARE @NEWLREF   INT
DECLARE @DEBITINC  FLOAT
DECLARE @CREDITINC FLOAT
DECLARE @CURRTYP SMALLINT
DECLARE @TRTOTTYPE SMALLINT
SELECT @EPSILON = 0.0000001
SELECT @ACTIVE = 0
SELECT @LOCALTYPE = 1
SELECT @CURRTYPE = 2
SELECT @DEBITINC = 0
SELECT @CREDITINC = 0
SELECT @CURRTYP = 0
SELECT @TRTOTTYPE = 8
IF (@CANCELLED = 0) AND ((@STATUS = 0) OR (@STATUS IS NULL))
 BEGIN IF ((@TRCODE = 71) OR (@TRCODE = 72))
        SELECT @NOFDAYS = 0
        ELSE BEGIN SELECT @DTERROR = 0
                   IF EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_TRANSAC)
                    BEGIN SELECT @YEARBEG = PERIODBEGDATE FROM LG_223_01_TRANSAC
                          IF (@YEARBEG IS NULL)
                           SELECT @DTERROR = 1
                    END
                   IF (@DTERROR = 0)
                    SELECT @NOFDAYS = DATEDIFF(DAY,@YEARBEG,@TRDATE)+1
                    ELSE SELECT  @NOFDAYS = 1
             END
       IF (@AMOUNT > @EPSILON)
        BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                     WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                           (TOTTYPE = @LOCALTYPE) AND
                           (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                     AND   (DATE_ = @TRDATE)
                           )
               BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_223_01_CSHTOTS @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                     INSERT INTO LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                            (CARDREF, TOTTYPE, DAY_, DEBIT, CREDIT
                            , DATE_, CURRTYP
                            )
                     VALUES
                            (@CASHREF, @LOCALTYPE, @NOFDAYS, 0, 0
                            ,@TRDATE, @CURRTYP
                            )
               END
              IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
                     WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                           (TOTTYPE = @LOCALTYPE)
                           )
               BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                     INSERT INTO LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
                            (CARDREF, TOTTYPE, DEBIT, CREDIT
                            )
                     VALUES
                            (@CASHREF, @LOCALTYPE, 0, 0)
               END
              IF @TRSIGN = @ACTIVE
               SELECT  @DEBITINC = @COEF*@AMOUNT
               ELSE SELECT @CREDITINC = @COEF*@AMOUNT
              UPDATE LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
               SET DEBIT = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                   CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
               WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                     (TOTTYPE = @LOCALTYPE) AND
                     (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                 AND (DATE_= @TRDATE)
              UPDATE LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
               SET DEBIT = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                   CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
               WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                     (TOTTYPE = @LOCALTYPE)
        END
       IF (@REPORTNET > @EPSILON)
        BEGIN SELECT @CURRTYP = FIRMREPCURR FROM LG_223_TRGPAR
              IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                      WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                            (TOTTYPE = @CURRTYPE) AND
                            (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                        AND (DATE_= @TRDATE)
                            )
               BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_223_01_CSHTOTS @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                     INSERT INTO LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                            (CARDREF, TOTTYPE, DAY_, DEBIT, CREDIT
                            ,DATE_, CURRTYP
                            )
                      VALUES
                             (@CASHREF, @CURRTYPE, @NOFDAYS, 0, 0
                             ,@TRDATE, @CURRTYP
                             )
               END
              IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
                      WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                            (TOTTYPE = @CURRTYPE)
                            )
               BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                     INSERT INTO LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
                            (CARDREF, TOTTYPE, DEBIT, CREDIT
                            )
                      VALUES
                             (@CASHREF, @CURRTYPE, 0, 0)
               END
              IF @TRSIGN = @ACTIVE
               SELECT  @DEBITINC = @COEF*@REPORTNET
               ELSE SELECT @CREDITINC = @COEF*@REPORTNET
              UPDATE LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
               SET DEBIT = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                   CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
               WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                     (TOTTYPE = @CURRTYPE) AND
                     (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                 AND (DATE_= @TRDATE)
              UPDATE LG_223_01_GNTOTCSH
               SET DEBIT = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                   CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
               WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                     (TOTTYPE = @CURRTYPE)
        END
       IF (@TRNET > @EPSILON) AND (@TRCODE <> 79) AND (@TRCODE <> 80)
        BEGIN SELECT @CURRTYP = @TRCURR
              IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                     WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                           (TOTTYPE = @TRTOTTYPE) AND
                           (CURRTYP = @CURRTYP) AND
                           (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                     AND   (DATE_ = @TRDATE)
                           )
               BEGIN --EXECUTE LREF_LG_223_01_CSHTOTS @NEWLREF OUTPUT
                     INSERT INTO LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
                            (CARDREF, TOTTYPE, DAY_, DEBIT, CREDIT
                            , DATE_, CURRTYP
                            )
                     VALUES
                            (@CASHREF, @TRTOTTYPE, @NOFDAYS, 0, 0
                            ,@TRDATE, @CURRTYP
                            )
               END
              IF @TRSIGN = @ACTIVE
               SELECT  @DEBITINC = @COEF*@TRNET
               ELSE SELECT @CREDITINC = @COEF*@TRNET
              UPDATE LG_223_01_CSHTOTS
               SET DEBIT = DEBIT + @DEBITINC,
                   CREDIT = CREDIT + @CREDITINC
               WHERE (CARDREF = @CASHREF) AND
                     (TOTTYPE = @TRTOTTYPE) AND
                     (CURRTYP = @CURRTYP) AND
                     (DAY_ = @NOFDAYS)
                 AND (DATE_= @TRDATE)
        END
 END
